title: 中国与世界的新贸易前沿——服务业
content: China’s trade strategy is evolving beyond goods to focus on services, positioning the country as a global player in professional, digital, and export‑based services. The shift aims to enhance economic resilience, foster high‑value sectors, and improve trade balances while integrating with international supply chains. The focus includes technology services, financial exports, and business support, reflecting a broader trend toward service‑driven trade growth.

Morning markets rebounded, with U.S. stocks turning positive and oil futures falling 16% as cease‑fire news eased tensions. The recent volatility shows that finance reacts to expectations, not fundamentals. Long‑term investors should stay rational amid panic and disciplined during euphoria, focusing on solid companies and industry trends rather than short‑term geopolitics. The Persian Gulf remains a critical energy choke point, but enduring value comes from understanding trends and maintaining a long‑term perspective while supporting a peaceful global future.

title: 刚刚，DeepSeek大升级，V4真的不远了｜附体验细节
content: DeepSeek’s web client has quietly added “Fast” and “Expert” modes, indicated by lightning and diamond icons. Fast mode, likely a lightweight V4 Lite, is quick, supports images and files, but less accurate on complex reasoning. Expert mode routes to a larger V4 model, offering higher accuracy on physics and logic tasks, though it currently lacks file and multimodal support. A future Vision mode may add true multimodal capability. The split signals a shift toward product stratification, balancing free access with potential future paid or quota‑based tiers.

content: DeepSeek V4 is expected to launch this month. A recent system crash and a new gray‑scale test confirmed an upcoming upgrade. A senior Weibo developer revealed a redesigned interface featuring Quick, Expert, and Vision modes. The new model lineup may include a Lite version, the standard DeepSeek V4, and a Vision variant. DeepSeek is also developing at least two large models powered by domestic AI chips and plans an AI‑coding specialized edition to compete with Anthropic and OpenAI.

title: OpenAI 首席科学家 Ilya 偷拍 70 页文件指控 CEO 奥尔特曼习惯撒谎
content: An 18‑month investigation by The New York Times revealed that OpenAI’s chief scientist, Ilya Sutskever, and Anthropic co‑founder Dario Amodei released internal notes alleging that CEO Sam Altman habitually lies. Altman was briefly fired in November 2023 for “inadequate honesty” but reinstated five days later, an incident called “The Blip.” The report, never released, raises doubts about board governance, the collapse of OpenAI’s safety culture, Altman’s opaque equity dealings and his risky geopolitical alliances, especially with Middle East regimes.

title: 宗馥莉和弟妹被曝握手言和：清明共同去给宗庆后扫墓
content: The Wahaha family’s inheritance dispute shows signs of easing.  During the Qingming holiday, family members including Zong Fuli, her brother-in‑law, and the former president of Wahaha met at their ancestors’ tomb, signaling reconciliation.  In late March, Zong Fuli reached a compromise with Shanghai Cultural Tourism, agreeing to an additional payment of more than 2 billion RMB for a joint project.  Du Jian‑ying also participated in negotiating the sale of shares and agreed to cover over 300 million RMB of the purchase.

title: 全球内存芯片短缺，苹果 Mac mini / Studio 发货严重延迟
content: Apple’s Mac mini and Mac Studio models requiring large memory have significant back‑order delays due to a global shortage of memory chips, driven largely by soaring demand from AI server builds. In the U.S. and China, high‑memory configurations can take up to 4–5 months to ship, with 64 GB M4 Pro Mac mini orders arriving in about 16–18 weeks. Even base models face roughly a one‑month delay, and the 256 GB M3 Ultra Mac Studio also awaits 4–5 months. Prices remain high, and near‑term improvements are unlikely.

title: Anthropic 称其年化收入已超 300 亿美元
content: Anthropic announced on April 6 that it signed new agreements with Google and Broadcom to acquire next‑generation TPU compute, reflecting a rapid rise in Claude user demand. The company reports its annualized revenue now exceeds $30 billion, far above the roughly $9 billion projected by the end of 2025.

title: 千寻智能宣布完成新一轮 10 亿元融资

This follows a nearly CNY 2 billion round in February, bringing total raised capital to CNY 3 billion within 30 days. The company is advancing its data infrastructure under a “diversity data” strategy, having collected over 200,000 hours of real‑world interaction data and projecting a 1 million‑hour dataset by 2026.

title: 被称为「GPT-4o 之母」的 OpenAI 高管宣布离职
content: OpenAI executive Joanne Jang, known as the “mother of GPT‑4o,” announced her departure after 4½ years, without explaining the reason or her next move. She led the team that gave ChatGPT its core capabilities. Her exit adds to recent executive turnover, which has included multiple departures and disagreements between CEO and CFO over the IPO timeline. With OpenAI valued at $852 billion and preparing to go public, the instability in top management has raised broad concerns about the IPO process.

title: 小鹏回应与澳大利亚经销商合作破裂：已终止其独家代理资格
content: Xpeng Auto terminated TrueEV's exclusive dealership status in Australia after two years of partnership problems. TrueEV faced a cash flow collapse, was taken over by its financing partner, failed to purchase vehicles for over a year, did not fulfill orders, and clashed with local dealers. Xpeng formally notified TrueEV of breach of contract and revoked its exclusive representation, though the company remains an authorized dealer.

title: 携程集团将启动「无理由事假」管理实验
content: Ctrip Group will pilot a “no-reason personal leave” experiment starting May 1, 2026, in selected business units. Approximately 6,000 employees will be randomly assigned to either an experimental or control group. Those in the experimental group can take up to 45 additional paid days per year without needing to provide a reason, in addition to regular paid leave. The policy’s future adoption will depend on the results after one year.

title: 这种颜色，全世界只有五个人见过 | 原文
content: L. Frank Baum’s 1900 novel *The Wizard of Oz* features the Emerald City, shrouded in green light. To “protect” visitors, guardians force them to wear green-tinted glasses, making everything appear emerald. In 1925, a different institution—University of California, Berkeley—built a device named Oz, which covertly reverses this effect, allowing observers to see through the green filter. The article contrasts Baum’s fictional optical illusion with Berkeley’s real-world technological reversal.

title: 芒格揭示长寿的关键：体力消耗不大、遵循规律规则、时间由自己主导。而这三点恰恰是价值投资者的日常状态
content: Charlie Munger and Warren Buffett illustrate how value investing promotes longevity: low physical strain, adherence to clear rules, and self‑directed time management. Their peers—famous value investors—reached high ages, while journalists and gamblers tend to die earlier due to stress, smoking, and overtrading. Value investing favors long‑term ownership over speculation, reducing anxiety and physical wear, which aligns with healthier, more fulfilling lifestyles that support longer life.

title: 开源一个给 LLM Agent 用的长期记忆框架： LycheeMem
content: LycheeMem is an open‑source long‑term memory framework for LLM agents, aiming to improve persistence across multi‑turn, multi‑task, and multi‑session scenarios while keeping deployment easy. It supports LangGraph, HTTP MCP, and OpenClaw, and offers compact semantic memory with SQLite + LanceDB, HTTP MCP, and native OpenClaw plugins. The package can be installed with `pip install lycheemem`. Early tests on PinchBench and OpenClaw show about 6 % performance gain and reductions of ~71 % in tokens and ~55 % in cost. The project is available on GitHub.

title: Principles of Mechanical Sympathy
content: Modern hardware offers great speed, yet many software systems do not use it fully. Caer Sanders promotes “mechanical sympathy,” designing programs that work well with the underlying hardware. His key guidance is to ensure predictable memory access, respect cache line boundaries, use single‑writer patterns, and process data in natural batches. This approach helps software achieve better performance and reliability by aligning closely with hardware behavior.

Long wait times in restaurants and stores raise average spend per customer: each extra 10 minutes can boost spending by about 5%, up to 20%. Customers compensate for waiting by buying more. In retail, seeing others buy en masse increases one's purchase intent by 50%+ and volume by 40%+. Limited‑stock items trigger fear‑of‑missing‑out, raising spend by 80%. Thus, when a popular restaurant eliminates lines, both table turnover and average order value fall, harming revenue. The same pattern applies to retail brands and companies facing cyclic or structural challenges.

title: 第一批用AI的人，已经染上了AI疲惫症
content: The article reports that many workers experience “AI fatigue” as token usage becomes linked to performance metrics, turning AI usage into a new form of compensation. Companies track token consumption, create rankings, and offer token quotas, driving a competitive “token race.” This focus inflates workloads, forces constant AI supervision, and expands responsibilities, leading to reduced focus, increased multitasking, and higher burnout rates. Research shows AI raises productivity only up to a point; beyond that, attentional overload and job strain increase, questioning whether AI truly liberates workers or merely accelerates work.

title: “本地优先” 与 CRDT
content: Local‑first software moves data ownership from cloud servers to users’ devices, enabling offline use while still allowing real‑time collaboration. It flips the traditional client/server model: the device holds the authoritative copy, the server merely syncs and backs up. The core challenge—conflict‑free merging—is solved by CRDTs, data structures that merge without conflicts by design. Key projects include Automerge, Yjs, and Loro, each advancing performance and usability. The movement seeks greater privacy, resilience, and user autonomy in the digital ecosystem.

title: nvm for windows之死：别再被这个“过时工具”耽误开发
content: NVM for Windows, once the default Node manager for Windows, has reached end‑of‑life. Its last stable release, v1.2.2, ceased new features in 2025, and its developers plan to replace it with a cross‑platform tool called rt. The old Go‑based implementation struggles with modern Node releases, permission issues, and no .nvmrc support, causing frequent failures and wasted time. Modern alternatives—Volta (stable, auto‑switching), fnm (fast, lightweight), or direct Node installs—offer better performance, security, and team consistency.

title: AI 时代的管理后台框架，应该是什么样子？
content:
这些年我一直在做 Fantastic-admin 这套管理后台框架。也一直在关注这个圈子的发展，虽然“技术栈在升级”、“UI 风格也在变化”，但管理后台框架核心一直在不断解决同一个问题： 如何把那些反复出现、又特别容易失控的工程问题，提前收敛成一套系统能力。

早期，这个问题的答案是“给我一个能跑起来的脚手架”；后来变成“帮我把常见页面骨架搭好”；再后来，变成“不要让我被框架反过来绑架”；而到了今天，在 AI 和 Agent 已经真的进入开发现场之后，我觉得问题已经变成了：

一个管理后台框架，能不能同时服务开发者和 Agent ？

这也是我写这篇文章的原因…

title: Linus Torvalds 确认 Linux 7.0 内核下周将发布正式版本
content: Linus Torvalds announced that Linux kernel 7.0’s seventh candidate release (RC7) passed the week’s tests without major surprises, indicating the stable release will launch next week. The release cycle faced a sudden spike in patch volume due to a holiday pause and widespread AI coding tools. About half the patches were driver updates; the rest fixed networking, filesystem, architecture, and documentation. Testers are urged to continue testing before the final release. Different distributions will adopt the kernel at varying speeds.

title: 精心打造一款 Go 语言 Gin 框架 DDD 脚手架，适合指导 AI 快速搭建项目
content: Gin-Framework-DDD is a Go scaffold that implements Domain‑Driven Design with the Gin web framework and RocketMQ. It provides a four‑layer architecture (domain, application, infrastructure, interface), two‑database support (MySQL for users, PostgreSQL for orders), unified response handling, global middleware, and optional email notifications. The scaffold serves as a template for medium‑sized projects, illustrating the differences between DDD and MVC structures and helping teams create maintainable, event‑driven services.

title: 程序员使用 Skills 一人运营十个自媒体
content: Panda Video Generator is an end‑to‑end automation engine that lets a single programmer run ten social‑media accounts. It extracts text from web pages, converts it to video using TTS and template rendering, and publishes the result simultaneously to platforms such as Bilibili, Douyin, YouTube, Xiaohongshu, and Kuaishou. The system integrates web scraping, speech‑to‑visual conversion, and browser automation, with a visual guide for non‑tech users and an “Agent Skills” module that chains all steps into one command.

title: 《巴菲特50年投资生涯亏损与反思时间线》
content: The timeline lists Buffett’s major investment failures and reflections. Key losses include the Berkshire textiles (1962‑85), Air America (1989), Dexter Shoes (1993), GE Life‑Insurance (1998), Conoco (2006‑08), British retailer Sainsbury (2012‑14), IBM (2011‑18), and US airlines (2016‑20). Common lessons are avoiding sunk‑cost attachment, recognizing industry structure over short‑term price, heeding tail risks, cutting losses promptly, and refraining from macro predictions. These insights underline the importance of disciplined, fundamentals‑based investing.

title: 我国钠离子电池取得重大突破 ，彻底阻断热失控

The modern economy functions like a nervous system that thrives on stable, predictable signals. Known costs are manageable variables, while unpredictable, volatile shocks act as noise that disrupts decision-making and coordination, causing more severe dysfunction than high prices alone. title: 风险投资机构做不到的，其实你可以做到
content: VC firms focus on risk mitigation rather than simply finding high‑return startups. They use legal safeguards, due diligence, and post‑investment monitoring to protect capital in a context where 90% of new companies fail. Returns follow a power‑law: most deals lose money, only a few yield outsized gains. Timing (“vintage”) matters; investing during downturns can produce better outcomes. VC’s “invest‑in‑people” skillset can be applied to public‑market investing, where individual investors enjoy lower friction, unlimited time, and free due diligence, yet still need deep judgment, discipline, and risk tolerance.

title: OpenTelemetry 分布式追踪中的回溯采样：削减 60% 尾部采样成本
content: Retroactive sampling for OpenTelemetry reduces outbound traffic and CPU/memory usage by 60‑70 % compared to traditional tail‑sampling. It forwards only minimal span data (trace_id, start/end times, status code) to the collector, which decides which traces to keep. Agents then purge unafflicted spans, sending only sampled ones to storage. The approach uses disk‑backed buffers at agents, limiting in‑memory load, and can be extended with local‑decision variants for simpler attributes. Benchmarks show significant resource savings with modest disk usage.

Limited lifetime redemption codes are available for download from the App Store.

title: 疯狂的Skill
content: In early 2026, GitHub’s “Skill” trend grew as users packaged colleagues, ex‑partners, mentors, or even themselves into AI‑driven modules that replicate personality, behavior, and work habits from digital archives. The movement, spurred by industry frameworks like Anthropic’s Claude skills, raises concerns about privacy, labor value, and the erosion of human connection, as AI can mimic but not replace the nuanced, unquantifiable aspects of people.

title: 段永平说”假设飞天没人喝了？”——用茅台的逻辑回击泡泡玛特最大的质疑
content: 段永平回应泡泡玛特被质疑过度依赖Labubu产品时，借用茅台飞天系列占比70%以上的例子，说明核心产品集中并非决定成败。 他强调成功企业通常有少量关键产品，并认为只要核心产品需求持续即可。 通过对比茅台与泡泡玛特，他试图纠正投资者用“最坏情况”假设否定新兴潮玩品牌的思维。

title: 互联网最骄傲的事，正在被AI一点点拆掉
content: Internet companies that once thrived on lightweight code now invest billions in AI infrastructure—data centers, power, cooling—making their operations heavy and costly. The shift reverses traditional scale economies: more users increase per‑token costs instead of decreasing them. Big players in the U.S. and China are building power‑hungry facilities; smaller startups can still innovate but rely on expensive, centralized resources. Consequently, control of cheap electricity and AI hardware is becoming key to industry dominance.
